title: Server Info Command (fork)
body:
# Rewrite version [Server Info Command](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-info-command)
# Fix `/server plugins` and add `/server tps`

Server Info command
Client side command that displays useful information about currently connected server.

 

Access it by running either `/server` or `/server plugins`. Requires Fabric API.

Information includes:

- address or ip and port
- message of the day
- server and protocol version
- global and local difficulty
- day
- user permission level
- server tps
- server plugins

[Original mod by c10udburst](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/server-info-command), forked by Kudo.
